info.title: BBL Plan-Check Area Management API
info.description: REST API for the BBL Area Management Platform. Manages buildings, floor plan documents (DWG/DXF), room and area geometry, validation against BBL CAD guidelines, team collaboration, and export to PDF, Excel, GeoJSON, and BCF. Supports the full lifecycle from building creation through document upload, automated validation, and compliance reporting.

tags.name: Buildings
tags.description: Building lifecycle management – create, update, archive, and delete area management buildings

tags.name: Floorplans
tags.description: Floor plan (DWG/DXF) and room list (Excel) management

tags.name: Geometry
tags.description: Rooms, areas, and spatial data extracted from floor plan documents

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Building team management – invite members, assign roles, manage access

tags.name: Rule Sets
tags.description: Validation rule sets and individual rule definitions per BBL CAD guideline

tags.name: Validation
tags.description: Document validation against rule sets with async job processing

tags.name: Export
tags.description: PDF, Excel, GeoJSON, and BCF export from validation results

tags.name: Batch
tags.description: Multi-floorplan batch validation within a building

get.description: Returns the current status of the API. Useful for monitoring and load balancers.
Returns version information, supported file formats, API limits, and available SIA phases.
Returns a paginated list of all buildings the authenticated user has access to. Supports filtering by status, search by name or number, and sorting.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by building name or number

post.description: Creates a new area management building. The building number must be unique. A rule set must be assigned for validation.

400.description: Invalid input or duplicate building number

get.description: Returns the full details of a building, including floorplan count, compliance score, and assigned team members.

put.description: Updates building metadata. Only fields included in the request body are updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a building and all associated floorplans, geometry, and validation results. This action cannot be undone.

patch.description: Sets the building status to `completed`. Archived buildings are read-only but remain accessible for reporting.

get.description: Returns aggregated KPIs for the building: total floorplans, rooms, gross floor area, average compliance score, and error/warning counts.
Returns all floorplans belonging to a building, including floor plans (DWG) and room lists (Excel) with their validation scores.

post.description: Uploads a floor plan (DWG/DXF, max 50 MB) or room list (Excel, max 10 MB) to the building. Geometry is automatically extracted from DWG files.

file.description: DWG/DXF file (max 50 MB) or Excel file (max 10 MB)

get.description: Returns document details including validation score, creation and edit timestamps, and file metadata.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a document and its associated geometry and validation results.

get.description: Returns all rooms extracted from a floor plan document, including AOID, area, function classification, SIA category, validation status, and polygon vertices.

totalArea.description: Sum of all room areas in m²

get.description: Returns full details of a single room including polygon vertices for rendering.
Returns gross floor area polygons extracted from a document. Areas represent aggregate building sections used for GFA (Geschossfläche) calculation.

totalGrossFloorArea.description: Sum of all gross floor areas in m²

get.description: Returns all team members assigned to the building with their roles.

post.description: Invites a user to the building by email and assigns a role. An invitation email is sent automatically.

email.description: Email address of the user to invite

role.description: Role to assign within the building

put.description: Updates the role of an existing building member.

delete.description: Removes a user from the building. The user's account is not deleted, only their building access.

get.description: Returns all available validation rule sets. Each building must reference a rule set for validation.
Returns a rule set with all its validation rules, grouped by category (Layer, Geometry, Entity, Text, AOID).
Returns the details of a specific validation rule within a rule set.

post.description: Starts asynchronous validation of a floorplan against the building's assigned rule set. Returns a job ID for status tracking. Validation checks layers, geometry, entity types, text, and AOID compliance.

rules.description: Optional subset of rule codes to validate (default: all rules in rule set)

get.description: Returns the current validation job status for a document. Possible statuses: `queued`, `processing`, `done`, `failed`.
Returns the full validation results for a document, including compliance score, all errors and warnings, and per-rule pass/fail status. Only available when validation status is `done`.

post.description: Creates an export from a validated document. Supported formats: `pdf` (validation report), `excel` (room list with areas), `geojson` (floor plan geometries), `bcf` (BIM Collaboration Format for error markup).

get.description: Returns the status of an in-progress or completed export.
Downloads the generated export file. Only available when export status is `ready`. The download link is valid for 24 hours.

post.description: Starts parallel validation of all DWG floorplans in the building. Each floorplan is validated against the building's assigned rule set.

floorplanIds.description: Optional subset of document IDs to validate (default: all DWG documents)

get.description: Returns the status of a batch validation, including progress of each individual document.
Returns an aggregated summary of all validation results in the batch. Only available when all jobs are completed.

buildingType.description: Building classification in the building's language

aoid.description: Area/Object ID per BBL naming convention

siaCategory.description: SIA space classification: HNF (Net Usable), NNF (Non-Net), VF (Traffic)

message.example: Erforderlicher Layer «A-WAENDE» fehlt in der Zeichnung

description.example: Prüft, ob alle 14 Pflichtlayer gemäss BBL CAD-Richtlinie vorhanden sind

grossFloorArea.description: Total gross floor area in m²

netFloorArea.description: Total net floor area (sum of all rooms) in m²

averageScore.description: Average validation score across all floorplans

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Request via the BBL portal.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token for user-level authentication. Obtain via the login endpoint.
